text: when you configure a lower hight than 34 on the desktop panel so then it comes to resize the Chrome icon to tiny  22 or 16? don't know, while other icons still stay larger, the problem is that the Chrome icon at the same time becomes black and so it becomes invisible in dark panels. I have checked with several alternative icon sets but it is all the same result, Chrome icon becomes black
